seoTitle: Dysart vs Eagleby — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dysart and Eagleby. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dysart and Eagleby.
heading: Dysart vs Eagleby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dysart, Queensland and Eagleby, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dysart has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Eagleby (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dysart or Eagleby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dysart has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Eagleby scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dysart scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Eagleby scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dysart or Eagleby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dysart has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
